ratings.comment: Prof. Lang was an amazing professor, very personable, and made lectures very easy to stay intrigued as well as interesting. Went fast through lectures, but always posted slides after class. Would recommend her to anyone interested in weather or atmospheric sciences.

Tests were pretty much right off the power points which were posted online. The amount of time you spend studying depends on if you go to class or not. Homework at times was challenging. Overall she knew her material and that class was not difficult
